name: Atlas Arteria
analysis: ALX's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 0% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (2.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$5.1000, stop A$5.0094, target A$5.3718 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
